title: Nowhere to Hide
lyrics: 🎵 Every time I look deep into your eyes I know Never meant to hurt you baby girl, no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I try to try Too many lies, no compromise, only rise The tears that I cry inside remain dry Stuffed deep inside, we know what you can't find Running away, far away, with no place to hide Every story gots at least two sides Part truth, part lies, keeping my eyes on the prize Gonna rise, remain wise, gonna rise till I die Alright, I think it's best for us to say goodbye Quit the fight, sacrifice, worth the price Now suffice, let your taste buds entice Yeah, take some advice, yeah, never thinking twice Twice as nice, what I like, I'm gonna write Doing it right all night, despite Your ways, so quick to take flight Just a fly away, it's gonna be alright It's gonna be okay, just might seem so Someday down the path I stray And if I do, I'm begging you, please find another way Wish I had the words to say, to make a better day But I don't, so I guess we'll be on our way And when you throw away games that you'd rather play away You can proceed to move forward and go on away Every time I look deep into your eyes I know I'm never meant to hurt you, baby girl, no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprise, it's not try to try Too many lives, no compromise, I'm gonna rise The tears that I cry inside remain dry Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide Running away and far away with no place to hide Correction, wretched, I need a correction for my erection No, it's just not me, it's not settled for you It's not the clear view I'm sorry, boo, you gotta move from the view It's not the lake, it's not like a rickety lake Can't take up two seats, you can't balance that I'm not your man, if I'm not your man You understand that, that's a plan I know you said goodbye too many times And it hurt my lines inside my mind So I took it out on you, every hurt that I felt I'm sorry, never meant to make you be welled So every time I hurt you, baby, I'm crying Every time I took you, baby, I'm lying If I lied to you, to the me, I can tell you It's like this, it goes Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes I know I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried Too many lies to compromise on the rise The tears that I'm crying inside remain dry Stuck deep inside with no one to confide Running away, far away, with no place to hide Got no place to hide With you looking out for me And you're twisting my reality No place to hide I got no place to hide from you No place to lie to you Oh, I gotta run from you All the lies and all the pride No more surprises, I tried and tried Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes I know I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried Too many lies to compromise on the rise The tears that I'm crying inside remain dry Stuck deep inside with no one to confide Running away, far away, with no place to hide

lyricsSegments.text: Every time I look deep into your eyes I know
Never meant to hurt you baby girl, no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I try to try
Too many lies, no compromise, only rise
The tears that I cry inside remain dry
Stuffed deep inside, we know what you can't find
Running away, far away, with no place to hide
Every story gots at least two sides
Part truth, part lies, keeping my eyes on the prize
Gonna rise, remain wise, gonna rise till I die
Alright, I think it's best for us to say goodbye
Quit the fight, sacrifice, worth the price
Now suffice, let your taste buds entice
Yeah, take some advice, yeah, never thinking twice
Twice as nice, what I like, I'm gonna write
Doing it right all night, despite
Your ways, so quick to take flight
Just a fly away, it's gonna be alright
It's gonna be okay, just might seem so
Someday down the path I stray
And if I do, I'm begging you, please find another way
Wish I had the words to say, to make a better day
But I don't, so I guess we'll be on our way
And when you throw away games that you'd rather play away
You can proceed to move forward and go on away
Every time I look deep into your eyes I know
I'm never meant to hurt you, baby girl, no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprise, it's not try to try
Too many lives, no compromise, I'm gonna rise
The tears that I cry inside remain dry
Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide
Running away and far away with no place to hide
Correction, wretched, I need a correction for my erection
No, it's just not me, it's not settled for you
It's not the clear view
I'm sorry, boo, you gotta move from the view
It's not the lake, it's not like a rickety lake
Can't take up two seats, you can't balance that
I'm not your man, if I'm not your man
You understand that, that's a plan
I know you said goodbye too many times
And it hurt my lines inside my mind
So I took it out on you, every hurt that I felt
I'm sorry, never meant to make you be welled
So every time I hurt you, baby, I'm crying
Every time I took you, baby, I'm lying
If I lied to you, to the me, I can tell you
It's like this, it goes
Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes
I know I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried
Too many lies to compromise on the rise
The tears that I'm crying inside remain dry
Stuck deep inside with no one to confide
Running away, far away, with no place to hide
Got no place to hide
With you looking out for me
And you're twisting my reality
No place to hide
I got no place to hide from you
No place to lie to you
Oh, I gotta run from you
All the lies and all the pride
No more surprises, I tried and tried
Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes
I know I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried
Too many lies to compromise on the rise
The tears that I'm crying inside remain dry
Stuck deep inside with no one to confide
Running away, far away, with no place to hide
